enriched_requirements.full_sentence: It may be noted that, whenever necessary, Reserve Bank shall issue directions to Authorised Persons through A.P.
enriched_requirements.object: Persons through A

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: v Period of TC The period of TC, reckoned from the date of shipment, shall be up to three years for import of capital goods.
enriched_requirements.object: years for import of capital goods

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: For non-capital goods, this period shall be up to one year or the operating cycle whichever is less.
enriched_requirements.object: year or the operating cycle whichever is less

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: For conversion to Rupee, exchange rate shall be the rate prevailing on the date of settlement.
enriched_requirements.object: on the date of settlement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The entities raising TC are required to follow the guidelines for hedging, if any, issued by the concerned sectoral or prudential regulator in respect of foreign currency exposure.
enriched_requirements.object: for hedging

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Such entities shall have a board approved risk management policy.
enriched_requirements.object: risk management policy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: TC transactions in respect of SEZs and DTAs as permitted above should also be in compliance with applicable provisions of SEZ Act, 2005 as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: with applicable provisions of SEZ Act, 2005 as amended from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Bank guarantees may be given by the ADs, on behalf of the importer, in favour of overseas lender of TC not exceeding the amount of TC.
enriched_requirements.object: ADs, on behalf of the importer, in favour of overseas lender of TC not exceeding the amount of TC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: TC may also be secured by overseas guarantee issued by foreign banks/overseas branches of Indian banks.
enriched_requirements.object: overseas guarantee issued by foreign banks/overseas branches of Indian banks

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: For the purpose of raising TC, the importer may also offer security of movable assets (including financial assets) / immovable assets (excluding land in SEZs) / corporate or personal guarantee for raising trade credit.
enriched_requirements.object: movable assets (including financial assets) / immovable assets (excluding land in SEZs) / corporate or personal guarantee for r

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: ADs may permit creation of charge on security offered / accept corporate or personal guarantee, duly ensuring that:
enriched_requirements.object: on security offered / accept corporate or personal guarantee, duly ensuring that:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: In case of invocation, the total payments towards guarantee should not exceed the dues towards trade credit;
enriched_requirements.object: trade credit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Creation/ enforcement / invocation of charge shall be as per the provisions contained in Foreign Exchange Management (Acquisition and Transfer of Immovable Property in India) Regulations, 2018 and Foreign Exchange Management (Transfer or Issue of Security by a Person Resident Outside India) Regulations, 2017, as amended from time to time, or any other relative Regulations framed under the Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999 and should also comply with applicable FDI/FII/SEZ policy/ rules/ guidelines.
enriched_requirements.object: provisions contained in Foreign Exchange Management (Acquisition and Transfer of Immovable Property in India) Regulations, 2018 and Fore

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Note: The directions on issuance of corporate or personal guarantee mentioned under this provision shall come into force from the date of publication, in the Official Gazette, of the relative Regulations issued under FEMA.
enriched_requirements.object: the date of publication, in the Official Gazette, of the relative Regulations issued under FEMA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Monthly reporting: AD Category I banks are required to furnish details of TCs like drawal, utilisation, and repayment of TC approved by all its branches, in a consolidated statement, during a month, in Form TC to the Director, Division of International Trade and Finance, Department of Economic Policy and Research, RBI, Central Office, Fort, Mumbai - 400 001 (and in MS-Excel file through email) so as to reach not later than 10th of the following month.
enriched_requirements.object: TCs like drawal, utilisation, and repayment of TC approved by all its branches, in a consolidated statement, during a month, in

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Each TC may be given a unique identification number by the AD bank.
enriched_requirements.object: identification number by the AD bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Note: Suppliers' credit beyond 180 days and up to one year/three years from the date of shipment for non-capital/capital goods respectively, should also be reported by the AD banks.
enriched_requirements.object: the AD banks

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Further, permissions granted by the AD banks/Regional offices of Reserve Bank for settlement of delayed import dues in terms of paragraphs B.5 and C.2 of the Master Direction on Import of Goods and Services dated January 1, 2016, as amended from time to time, should also be reported by the AD banks as per the aforesaid procedure..
enriched_requirements.object: the AD banks as per the aforesaid procedure

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: As the Reserve Bank has not prescribed any format or manner in which TC arrangements / loan agreements are to be documented, ADs may consider any document to satisfy themselves with the underlying TC arrangement.
enriched_requirements.object: satisfy themselves with the underlying TC arrangement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: ADs should ensure that there is no double financing on account of these transactions between a unit or a developer in a SEZ including FTWZ for purchase of non-capital and capital goods within an SEZ including FTWZ or from a different SEZ including FTWZ.
enriched_requirements.object: no double financing on account of these transactions between a unit or a developer in a SEZ including FTWZ for purchase of non-ca

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: ADs should also ensure that for import of non-capital goods, the period of TC, as applicable, is lower of operating cycle or one year (three years for shipyards / shipbuilders).
enriched_requirements.object: import of non-capital goods, the period of TC, as applicable, is lower of operating cycle or one year (three years for shipyards

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: In the case of fixed rate loans, the swap cost plus spread should not be more than the floating rate plus the applicable spread.
enriched_requirements.object: floating rate plus the applicable spread

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Additionally, for FCCBs, the issue related expenses should not exceed 4 per cent of the issue size and in case of private placement, these expenses should not exceed 2 per cent of the issue size, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: of the issue size and in case of private placement, these expenses should not exceed 2 per cent of the issue size, etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Under TC Framework, all-in-cost shall include rate of interest, other fees, expenses, charges, guarantee fees whether paid in foreign currency or INR.
enriched_requirements.object: other fees, expenses, charges, guarantee fees whether paid in foreign currency or INR

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Withholding tax payable in INR shall not be a part of all-in-cost.
enriched_requirements.object: all-in-cost

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Under the approval route, the prospective borrowers are required to send their requests to the Reserve Bank through their AD Banks for examination.
enriched_requirements.object: to the Reserve Bank through their AD Banks for examination

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Authorised dealer: Means a person authorised as an authorised dealer under subsection (1) of section 10 of the FEMA, 1999 (42 of 1999).
enriched_requirements.object: an authorised dealer under subsection (1) of section 10 of the FEMA, 1999 (42 of 1999)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Further, other entities raising ECB are required to follow the guidelines issued, if any, by the concerned sectoral or prudential regulator.
enriched_requirements.object: issued

conditions: Where there is more than one foreign equity holder in the borrowing company
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Where there is more than one foreign equity holder in the borrowing company, the portion of the share premium in foreign currency brought in by the lender(s) concerned shall only be considered for calculating the ratio.
enriched_requirements.object: calculating the ratio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: and should not be a country identified in the public statement of the FATF as (i) A jurisdiction having a strategic Anti-Money Laundering or Combating the Financing of Terrorism deficiencies to which counter measures apply;
enriched_requirements.object: in the public statement of the FATF as (i) A jurisdiction having a strategic Anti-Money Laundering or Combating the Financing

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Issuance of FCCBs shall also conform to other applicable regulations.
enriched_requirements.object: applicable regulations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Further, FCCBs should be without any warrants attached.
enriched_requirements.object: attached

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Issuance of FCEBs shall also conform to other applicable regulations.
enriched_requirements.object: applicable regulations

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Foreign Equity Holder: It means (a) direct foreign equity holder with minimum 25% direct equity holding in the borrowing entity, (b) indirect equity holder with minimum indirect equity holding of 51%, or (c) group company with common overseas parent.
enriched_requirements.object: holder with minimum 25% direct equity holding in the borrowing entity, (b) indirect equity holder with minimum indirect equi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Person Resident in India: It shall have the same meanings as assigned to them in Sections 2(v) of the FEMA, 1999.
enriched_requirements.object: as assigned to them in Sections 2(v) of the FEMA, 1999

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Special Economic Zone & Free Trade Warehousing Zone: They shall have the same meaning as assigned to them in Special Economic Zones Act 2005, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: as assigned to them in Special Economic Zones Act 2005, as amended from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Introduction: External Commercial Borrowings are commercial loans raised by eligible resident entities from recognised non-resident entities and should conform to parameters such as minimum maturity, permitted and non-permitted end-uses, maximum all-in-cost ceiling, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: as minimum maturity, permitted and non-permitted end-uses, maximum all-in-cost ceiling, etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The lender should be resident of FATF or IOSCO compliant country, including on transfer of ECB.
enriched_requirements.object: or IOSCO compliant country, including on transfer of ECB

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Call and put options, if any, shall not be exercisable prior to completion of minimum average maturity.
enriched_requirements.object: completion of minimum average maturity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The enhanced all-in-cost ceiling shall be available only to eligible borrowers of investment grade rating from Indian Credit Rating Agencies (CRAs).
enriched_requirements.object: eligible borrowers of investment grade rating from Indian Credit Rating Agencies (CRAs)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Other eligible borrowers may raise ECB within the existing all-in-cost ceiling as hitherto.
enriched_requirements.object: existing all-in-cost ceiling as hitherto

conditions: if any, for default or breach of covenants
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: vii Other costs Prepayment charge/ Penal interest, if any, for default or breach of covenants, should not be more than 2 per cent over and above the contracted rate of interest on the outstanding principal amount and will be outside the all-in-cost ceiling.
enriched_requirements.object: per cent over and above the contracted rate of interest on the outstanding principal amount and will be outside the all-in-cost ceiling

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: For conversion to Rupee, the exchange rate shall be the rate prevailing on the date of settlement.
enriched_requirements.object: on the date of settlement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
x Hedging provision
The entities raising ECB are required to follow the guidelines for hedging issued, if any, by the concerned sectoral or prudential regulator in respect of foreign currency exposure.
enriched_requirements.object: for hedging issued

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Infrastructure space companies shall have a Board approved risk management policy.
enriched_requirements.object: risk management policy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Further, such companies are required to mandatorily hedge 70 per cent of their ECB exposure in case the average maturity of the ECB is less than 5 years.
enriched_requirements.object: per cent of their ECB exposure in case the average maturity of the ECB is less than 5 years

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The designated AD Category- I bank shall verify that 70 per cent hedging requirement is complied with during the currency of the ECB and report the position to RBI through Form ECB 2.
enriched_requirements.object: cent hedging requirement is complied with during the currency of the ECB and report the position to RBI through Form ECB 2

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The following operational aspects with respect to hedging should be ensured:
Overseas investors are eligible to hedge their exposure in Rupee through permitted derivative products with AD Category I banks in India.
enriched_requirements.object: are eligible to hedge their exposure in Rupee through permitted derivative products with AD Category I banks in India

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The financial hedge for all exposures on account of ECB should start from the time of each such exposure (i.e.
enriched_requirements.object: of each such exposure (i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, an ECB may be considered naturally
hedged if the offsetting exposure has the maturity/cash flow within the same accounting year.
enriched_requirements.object: if the offsetting exposure has the maturity/cash flow within the same accounting year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Further, financial intermediaries (viz., Indian banks, All India Financial Institutions, or NBFCs) shall not invest in FCCBs/ FCEBs in any manner whatsoever.
enriched_requirements.object: in any manner whatsoever

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Parking of ECB proceeds domestically: ECB proceeds meant for Rupee expenditure should be repatriated immediately for credit to their Rupee accounts with AD Category I banks in India.
enriched_requirements.object: credit to their Rupee accounts with AD Category I banks in India

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: These term deposits should be kept in unencumbered position.
enriched_requirements.object: position

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: For approval route cases, the borrowers may approach the RBI with an application in prescribed format (Form ECB) for examination through their AD Category I bank.
enriched_requirements.object: an application in prescribed format (Form ECB) for examination through their AD Category I bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Such cases shall be considered keeping in view the overall guidelines, macroeconomic situation and merits of the specific proposals.
enriched_requirements.object: view the overall guidelines, macroeconomic situation and merits of the specific proposals

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Entities desirous to raise ECB under the automatic route may approach an AD Category I bank with their proposal along with duly filled in Form ECB.
enriched_requirements.object: I bank with their proposal along with duly filled in Form ECB

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Reporting Requirements: Borrowings under ECB Framework are subject to following reporting requirements apart from any other specific reporting required under the framework:

6.1.
Loan Registration Number (LRN): Any draw-down in respect of an ECB should happen only after obtaining the LRN from the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: the LRN from the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: To obtain the LRN, borrowers are required to submit duly certified Form ECB, which also contains terms and conditions of the ECB, in duplicate to the designated AD Category I bank.
enriched_requirements.object: Form ECB, which also contains terms and conditions of the ECB, in duplicate to the designated AD Category I bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Changes in terms and conditions of ECB: Changes in ECB parameters in consonance with the ECB norms, including reduced repayment by mutual agreement between the lender and borrower, should be reported to the DSIM through revised Form ECB at the earliest, in any case not later than 7 days from the changes effected.
enriched_requirements.object: DSIM through revised Form ECB at the earliest, in any case not later than 7 days from the changes effected

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: While submitting revised Form ECB the changes should be specifically mentioned in the communication.
enriched_requirements.object: the communication

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Monthly Reporting of actual transactions: The borrowers are required to report actual ECB transactions through Form ECB 2 Return through the AD Category I bank on monthly basis so as to reach DSIM within seven working days from the close of month to which it relates.
enriched_requirements.object: transactions through Form ECB 2 Return through the AD Category I bank on monthly basis so as to reach DSIM within seven working d

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Changes, if any, in ECB parameters should also be incorporated in Form ECB 2 Return.
enriched_requirements.object: Form ECB 2 Return

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The outstanding amount will be treated as written-off from external debt liability of the country but may be retained by the lender in its books for recovery through judicial/ non-judicial means;
enriched_requirements.object: lender in its books for recovery through judicial/ non-judicial means

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: b) No fresh ECB application by the entity should be examined/processed by the AD bank;
enriched_requirements.object: AD bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
c) Directorate of Enforcement should be informed whenever any entity is designated 'UNTRACEABLE
ENTITY';
enriched_requirements.object: entity is designated 'UNTRACEABLE ENTITY'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Cancellation of LRN: The designated AD Category I banks may directly approach DSIM for cancellation of LRN for ECB contracted, subject to ensuring that no draw down against the said LRN has taken place and the monthly ECB-2 returns till date in respect of the allotted LRN have been submitted to DSIM.
enriched_requirements.object: cancellation of LRN for ECB contracted

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Further, refinancing of ECB raised under the previous ECB frameworks may also be permitted, subject to additionally ensuring that the borrower is eligible to raise ECB under the extant framework.

The conversion, which should be with the lender's consent and without any additional cost, should not result
in contravention of eligibility and breach of applicable sector cap on the foreign equity holding under FDI policy;
enriched_requirements.object: consent and without any additional cost, should not result in contravention of eligibility and breach of applicable sector cap on

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For full conversion, the entire portion is to be reported in Form FC-GPR, while reporting to DSIM in Form
ECB 2 Return should be done with remarks "ECB fully converted to equity".
enriched_requirements.object: "ECB fully converted to equity"

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: It may be noted that the fair value of the equity shares to be issued shall be worked out with reference to the date of conversion only.
enriched_requirements.object: reference to the date of conversion only

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Once the aforesaid stipulations are met, the AD Category I bank may permit creation of charge on immovable assets, movable assets, financial securities and issue of corporate and/or personal guarantees, during the currency of the ECB with security co-terminating with underlying ECB, subject to the following:
i.
enriched_requirements.object: on immovable assets, movable assets, financial securities and issue of corporate and/or personal guarantees, during the currency of the ECB with security co-terminating with underlying ECB

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Creation of Charge on Immovable Assets: The arrangement shall be subject to the following:
a) Such security shall be subject to provisions contained in the Foreign Exchange Management
(Acquisition and Transfer of Immovable Property in India) Regulations, 2017, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: following: a) Such security shall be subject to provisions contained in the Foreign Exchange Management (Acquisition and Transfer of

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
b) The permission should not be construed as a permission to acquire immovable asset (property) in India,
by the overseas lender/ security trustee.
enriched_requirements.object: permission to acquire immovable asset (property) in India, by the overseas lender/ security trustee

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
c) In the event of enforcement / invocation of the charge, the immovable asset/ property will have to be
sold only to a person resident in India and the sale proceeds shall be repatriated to liquidate the outstanding ECB.
enriched_requirements.object: the outstanding ECB

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Encumbered movable assets may also be taken out of the country subject to getting 'No Objection Certificate' from domestic lender/s, if any.
enriched_requirements.object: of the country subject to getting 'No Objection Certificate' from domestic lender/s

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Creation of Charge over Financial Securities: The arrangements may be permitted subject to the following:
a) Pledge of shares of the borrowing company held by the promoters as well as in domestic associate
companies of the borrower is permitted.
enriched_requirements.object: the following: a) Pledge of shares of the borrowing company held by the promoters as well as in domestic associate companies o

conditions: In case of invocation of pledge
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
c) In case of invocation of pledge, transfer of financial securities shall be in accordance with the extant
FDI/FII policy including provisions relating to sectoral cap and pricing as applicable read with the
Foreign Exchange Management (Transfer or Issue of Security by a Person Resident outside India) Regulations, 2017, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: the extant FDI/FII policy including provisions relating to sectoral cap and pricing as applicable read with the Foreign Exchange

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Issue of Corporate or Personal Guarantee: The arrangement shall be subject to the following:
a) A copy of Board Resolution for the issue of corporate guarantee for the company issuing such
guarantee, specifying name of the officials authorised to execute such guarantees on behalf of the company or in individual capacity should be obtained.
enriched_requirements.object: following: a) A copy of Board Resolution for the issue of corporate guarantee for the company issuing such guarantee, specifying nam

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
b) Specific requests from individuals to issue personal guarantee indicating details of the ECB should be
obtained.

c) Such security shall be subject to provisions contained in the Foreign Exchange Management
(Guarantees) Regulations, 2026, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: contained in the Foreign Exchange Management (Guarantees) Regulations, 2026, as amended from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Additional Requirements: While exercising the delegated powers, the AD Category I banks should ensure that:
i.

conditions: if the ECB borrower has availed of credit facilities from the Indian banking system
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: It should also be ensured that if the ECB borrower has availed of credit facilities from the Indian banking system, including foreign branches/subsidiaries of Indian banks, any extension of tenure of ECB (whether matured or not) shall be subject to applicable prudential guidelines issued by Department of Banking Regulation of Reserve Bank including guidelines on restructuring.
enriched_requirements.object: prudential guidelines issued by Department of Banking Regulation of Reserve Bank including guidelines on restructuring

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The changes in the terms and conditions of ECB allowed by the ADs under the powers delegated and / or
changes approved by the Reserve Bank should be reported to the DSIM as given at paragraph 6.2 above.
enriched_requirements.object: DSIM as given at paragraph 6

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Further, these changes should also get reflected in the Form ECB 2 returns appropriately.
enriched_requirements.object: the Form ECB 2 returns appropriately

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The overall ceiling for such ECB shall be USD 10 billion or equivalent.
enriched_requirements.object: or equivalent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: However, OMCs should have a Board approved forex mark to market procedure and prudent risk management policy, for such ECB.
enriched_requirements.object: forex mark to market procedure and prudent risk management policy, for such ECB

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Recognised lender: Lender / investor shall be a resident of a FATF compliant country.
enriched_requirements.object: a FATF compliant country

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Currency: The borrowing should be denominated in any freely convertible currency or in Indian Rupees (INR) or a combination thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: freely convertible currency or in Indian Rupees (INR) or a combination thereof

conditions: In case of borrowing in INR
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: In case of borrowing in INR, the non-resident lender, should mobilise INR through swaps/outright sale undertaken through an AD Category-I bank in India.
enriched_requirements.object: sale undertaken through an AD Category-I bank in India

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: All-in-cost: Shall be mutually agreed between the borrower and the lender.
enriched_requirements.object: the borrower and the lender

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: and shall comply with foreign direct investment / foreign portfolio investment / or any other norms applicable for foreign lenders / entities holding such securities.
enriched_requirements.object: investment / foreign portfolio investment / or any other norms applicable for foreign lenders / entities holding such secur

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Borrowing by Entities under Investigation: All entities against which investigation / adjudication / appeal by the law enforcing agencies for violation of any of the provisions of the Regulations under FEMA pending, may raise ECB as per the applicable norms, if they are otherwise eligible, notwithstanding the pending investigations / adjudications / appeals, without prejudice to the outcome of such investigations / adjudications / appeals.
enriched_requirements.object: the applicable norms

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The borrowing entity shall inform about pendency of such investigation / adjudication / appeal to the AD Category-I bank / RBI as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: such investigation / adjudication / appeal to the AD Category-I bank / RBI as the case may be

conditions: in case of all applications where the borrowing entity has indicated about the pending investigations / adjudications / appeals
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Accordingly, in case of all applications where the borrowing entity has indicated about the pending investigations / adjudications / appeals, the AD Category I Banks / Reserve Bank while approving the proposal shall intimate the agencies concerned by endorsing a copy of the approval letter.
enriched_requirements.object: by endorsing a copy of the approval letter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: For clarification required, if any, AD banks may write to fedcoecbd@rbi.org.in of the Reserve Bank and/ or may be communicated at Telephone No.

In cases where a Rupee facility which is either fund based or non-fund based (such as letter of credit / guarantee / letter of undertaking / letter of comfort) or is in the form of derivative contract by residents that are subsidiaries of multinational companies, is guaranteed by a non-resident (non-resident group entity in case of derivative contracts), there is no transaction involving foreign exchange until the guarantee is invoked and the non-resident guarantor is required to meet the liability under the guarantee.
enriched_requirements.object: under the guarantee

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The arrangements shall be with the following terms:
i.
enriched_requirements.object: terms: i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The non-resident guarantor may discharge the liability by i) payment out of rupee balances held in India or ii) by remitting the funds to India or iii) by debit to his FCNR(B)/NRE account maintained with an AD bank in India.
enriched_requirements.object: i) payment out of rupee balances held in India or ii) by remitting the funds to India or iii) by debit to his FCNR(B)/NRE a

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: In such cases, the non-resident guarantor may enforce his claim against the resident borrower to recover the amount and on recovery he may seek repatriation of the amount if the liability is discharged either by inward remittance or by debit to FCNR(B)/NRE account.
enriched_requirements.object: the resident borrower to recover the amount and on recovery he may seek repatriation of the amount if the liability is disch

conditions: where the liability is met by the non-resident out of funds remitted to India or by debit to his FCNR(B)/NRE account
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: In cases where the liability is met by the non-resident out of funds remitted to India or by debit to his FCNR(B)/NRE account, the repayment may be made by credit to the FCNR(B)/NRE/NRO account of the guarantor provided, the amount remitted/credited shall not exceed the rupee equivalent of the amount paid by the non-resident guarantor against the invoked guarantee.
enriched_requirements.object: of the amount paid by the non-resident guarantor against the invoked guarantee

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The underlying debt instrument should have a minimum average maturity of three years;
enriched_requirements.object: maturity of three years

conditions: in case the novated loan is designated in foreign currency
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: NBFC-IFC proposing to avail of the credit enhancement facility should comply with the eligibility criteria and prudential norms laid down in the circular DNBS.PD.CC No.168/03.02.089/2009-10 dated February 12, 2010 and in case the novated loan is designated in foreign currency, the IFC should hedge the entire foreign currency exposure;
enriched_requirements.object: criteria and prudential norms laid down in the circular DNBS

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The reporting arrangements as applicable to the ECB would be applicable to the novated loans."

10 FEMA 8/2000-RB dated May 3, 2000 superseded vide FEMA 8(R)/2026-RB dated January 6, 2026.
enriched_requirements.object: FEMA 8(R)/2026-RB dated January 6, 2026
